{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's jade medallion
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] wears a [[jade]] medallion etched with the image of a hammer on a dark silk ribbon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
